name: zenfinance
description: ZenFinance — AI personal finance coach (iOS app). This monorepo holds the API, the marketing/support/admin site, and shared packages.

scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @zenfinance/shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build -w @zenfinance/shared && npm run build -w @zenfinance/api
scripts.build:site: npm run build -w @zenfinance/shared && npm run build:marketing -w @zenfinance/site && npm run build:admin -w @zenfinance/site
